brief: Extend existing brix.math using typed overloads (same name for Int and Float). Add Float overloads if missing, plus `fn approxEq(a: Float, b: Float, eps: Float) -> Bool = abs(a - b) <= eps`. Do not invent absF/minF/clampInt suffixes — use overloaded abs/min/max/clamp. Exact `fn`/`=` syntax. Preserve existing decls. No Decimal/units. Host formats after check.
